name: Zombie

spec.method_detail: Blend with crushed ice or shake hard. Pour unstrained into tiki mug or tall glass.

garnish: Mint bouquet, lime shell, cherry, umbrella
history: Donn Beach (Don the Beachcomber) created the Zombie in 1934 at his Hollywood bar. Legend says he gave it to a hungover businessman, who returned days later saying it had turned him into a zombie for three days. Beach limited guests to two per sitting — a limit still enforced at some bars. The original recipe was kept secret for decades and was finally decoded from Beach's coded recipe books by Jeff 'Beachbum' Berry.
